cameras.title: Wireless Outdoor Camera
cameras.description: 1080p HD video, wire-free setup, night vision, and smart motion alerts.

cameras.title: Smart Indoor Camera
cameras.description: Perfect for monitoring pets and checking in. Wide-angle lens, privacy shutter, and clear audio.

cameras.title: Smart Video Doorbell
cameras.description: See who is at your doorstep. 2-way audio, HDR video, and package detection.

plans.title: Fast Protect™ Plan
plans.description: 24/7 professional monitoring with police dispatch, fire protection, and live video verification.

plans.title: Standard Monitoring
plans.description: 24/7 professional monitoring for police and fire dispatch. Basic alerts.

plans.title: Self-Monitoring + Recording
plans.description: Camera recording and basic alerts. No professional dispatch.

plans.title: Self-Monitoring (Free)
plans.description: No monthly fees, basic notifications only.

sensors.title: Entry Sensor
sensors.description: Detects when doors or windows open.

accessories.title: Keychain Remote
accessories.description: Arm and disarm your system with a press of a button.
